quote_of_day.text: Was saved by pure miracle. Already passed out and would have hanged to death, but noose broke. But no info if he still suffered neck damage or broken neck from hitting with such force his head on the chair.
quote_of_day.name: Ambedkar

articles.title: Weather for Indus today
articles.body:
A low-pressure system of caste animosity moved over the board, bringing scattered showers of contempt. Anon mocked 'pajeets' and their supposed deference to a 'white master', sparking a brief but intense squall of replies.

A cold front of antisemitic claims blew in later, with one anon asserting Jewish control over the entertainment industry and targeting of Indians. This brought a flurry of responses, but the topic soon dissipated.

Meanwhile, a gentle drizzle of conversation touched on lighter topics, including a user's top 4 movie picks and a comparison between Induschan and 4chan that sparked a caste row.

The discussion remained mostly clear of intense conflict, with only brief overcast periods.

articles.title: Anon mocks 'pajeets' and their supposed worship of a 'white master'
articles.body:
Anon opened the thread with a post saying 'pajeets even after seeeing this be like "yes saar white master saar we agree saar, saaar"'.

Anon responded to a post saying 'patriotic jatt penis >jatt >patriotic' by claiming that the Jatt regiment was the first to attack India and aid East Pakistan.

Another anon argued that Dravidian ideology was formed on Periyar's coded communist views and that the term 'Dravidan' is appropriated.

A respondent stated that pajeets know their place or get 'yeeted back to their slums, its just facts'.

Anon also claimed that 'dalits' are 'low iq sepratist' who 'larp dravidian, kanglus' and that their ancestors were slaves of Aryans.

A poster also joked about pajeets reacting to memes, saying 'pajeets when you even post a meme about them they still do the exact same shit lmao'.

Anon questioned why pajeets treat white worship as bad or insulting, saying 'They are quite literally better humans'. A respondent mocked pajeets, saying 'can’t fix stupid, can’t even fix their own country'.

Anon also mentioned that 'pajeets will larp forever but deep down they know'.

articles.title: Anon Questions Deportation of Kanglus from Dalli
articles.body:
Anon asked if it's true that authorities are unable to deport kanglus from Dalli because they can't differentiate between Jats and kanglus.

One respondent claimed that people misunderstand the term 'kang' and that it's mostly used ironically as a self-deprecating joke.

They gave examples of Yadavs claiming to be descendants of Lord Krishna and Jatts claiming to come from the dreadlocks of Lord Shiva.

Another anon argued that 'kanging' is based on community achievements and not physical appearance, except in 'autistic looksmaxxing forums.' They suggested that Dalits get criticized despite not being racially different.

A third anon joked that kanglus are basically Dalits, making deportation efforts pointless. They questioned the effectiveness of trying to differentiate between Jatts and kanglus.

A different poster disagreed with the OP, stating that Delhi Jatts are not the same as those in Punjab, differing in appearance and temperament.

Anon also made a comment about the physical appearance of Jatts in Delhi, saying they are tall and well-built.

The conversation included various other comments, including one that suggested the OP might be a 'bimaru' but still had a valid point, and another that joked about a 'tamil crowd.'

articles.title: Anon Claims Jews Control Entertainment, Target Indians
articles.body:
Anon posted a claim that Jews control the entertainment industry and are specifically targeting Indians.

The original poster (OP) gave an example of a game with an Indian protagonist, which was allegedly altered by Jews to have the Indian wife character turn into a lesbian.

Another anon responded, dismissing the idea that Jews have time to care about Indian drama, suggesting the game simply had a random side quest.

This anon also called the OP's post "peak /pol/ cope" and found the "cucked husband" trope to be overdone. The OP's claim was met with a mix of reactions.

One anon argued that the game's main story, not a side quest, revolved around the Indian wife character turning lesbian. This anon also insulted the OP's intelligence, calling them a "retard" and suggesting India is 76 IQ.

The conversation took a darker turn with an anon stating that the scenario described was "the most jew thing ever." This anon also made a comment about 180 IQ Indians being oblivious to Jewish influence.

Other anons chimed in with claims of Jewish control in various sectors, including IT services in India.

One anon expressed fear that India has submitted to Jewish influence, while another anon made a comment about American neo-Nazis making fun of Indians.

The discussion was marked by a tone of paranoia and anti-Semitism, with several anons using derogatory language towards Jews.

articles.title: Anon compares Induschan to 4chan, sparks caste row
articles.body: Anon posted '4chan feels less toxic then whatever this is, dalit saar dalit, hindoo bad saar eat cow saar, you caste bad WHO CARES.' Other anons responded with insults. One said 'lol fuck off anon ur just salty cuz ur life sucks more than a dalit in a brahmin's house.' Another anon joked 'dalit saar dalit my ass, op's just mad 4chan's not burning down his shitty hindu temples 24/7.'

articles.title: User shares top 4 movies, others respond
articles.body: Anon posted a thread sharing their top 4 movies, attaching an image. Anon criticised the OP's list, saying it was garbage and recommending they watch 'Revenge of the Sith' and 'Citizen Kane'. Another Anon joked about the OP's image, calling it '4 jpeg trash'. Anon also discussed their own gaming experiences, mentioning Quake and Team Fortress Classic.
